violations.issue: <ul> and <ol> must only directly contain <li>, <script> or <template> elements
violations.recommendation: Review remediation guidance: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/list?application=webdriverio

violations.issue: Image alternative text may not be meaningful.
violations.recommendation: The alt text 'Dream Destination logo' is present but lacks specificity. It does not describe the purpose or content of the logo, which is essential for screen reader users to understand the context of the image. Additionally, the image context (production/market: US) suggests this is part of a navigation or branding element, but the alt text does not convey this meaning effectively.

violations.issue: Link purpose may not be clear.
violations.recommendation: Link text is not descriptive and contains non-link text ('production\n- market: US').

violations.issue: One or more form labels may not be relevant.
violations.recommendation: Most form fields lack proper labels or have empty labels, making them inaccessible to screen reader users. Only 2 out of 40+ fields ('From station', 'To station', 'One-way', 'Return', 'Via station', 'Avoid London', 'Day(s)', 'Hour(s)', 'Minute(s)') have meaningful labels. The country/locale/currency dropdowns have no labels at all. This violates WCAG 2.1 Success Criterion 1.3.1 (Info and Relationships) and 3.3.2 (Labels or Instructions).
